anchors.source: Menlo Ventures ('>1 quadrillion tokens/yr'); Sacra (~$50M OR ARR Mar-26 @ ~5% take => ~$1B inference spend); Jun-26 snapshot ~$76M monthly spend

platform_tokens_vs_anchor: computed ~265T tok/mo vs OR-reported ~100T/mo (2026-05); tokens ~2.7x since => on-trend
implied_$_is_a_CEILING: list & cache-OFF: $247M/mo vs OR actual ~$76M/mo (2026-06) = 3.3x. OR spend was ~FLAT Mar~$83M->Jun$76M, so the gap is list-vs-realized (caching-off + provider discounting), NOT growth.
cache_sensitivity: if 50/70% of input were cache-reads: $148M/$108M per mo (vs $247M at cache-off)
input_heaviness: platform prompt:completion = 33.7:1 (97% input tokens) => $ is an INPUT-price construct
free_token_share: 25.8% of text tokens are $0 free-variant (padding the token base; use paid-token share to compare $)
nontext_excluded: 0.67% of all tokens excluded as non-text (image/audio/embed)
